waves.description: Contract Freeze / Scaffold - Create minimal TypeScript contract files for fresh ACPX mission proof

work_packets.title: Scaffold mission_types.ts contract file
acceptance_criteria: Contains minimal TypeScript interfaces for mission contracts
No runtime logic, test harnesses, or replay engines included

scaffold_exists:
from pathlib import Path
import sys
paths = ['src/contracts/mission_types.ts']
missing = [rel for rel in paths if not Path(rel).is_file()]
if missing:
    sys.stderr.write(f'missing={missing}\n')
    raise SystemExit(1)
typescript_contract_tokens:
from pathlib import Path
import sys
paths = ['src/contracts/mission_types.ts']
required = ('export ', 'interface ', 'type ', 'enum ')
invalid = []
for rel in paths:
    text = Path(rel).read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    if not any(token in text for token in required):
        invalid.append(rel)
if invalid:
    sys.stderr.write(f'missing_contract_tokens={invalid}\n')
    raise SystemExit(1)
typescript_schema_surface:
from pathlib import Path
import sys
paths = ['src/contracts/mission_types.ts']
surface_tokens = (
    'Schema',
    'schema',
    'export interface ',
    'export type ',
    'export const ',
)
invalid = []
for rel in paths:
    text = Path(rel).read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    if not any(token in text for token in surface_tokens):
        invalid.append(rel)
if invalid:
    sys.stderr.write(f'missing_schema_surface={invalid}\n')
    raise SystemExit(1)
typescript_lint_smoke:
from pathlib import Path
import sys
paths = ['src/contracts/mission_types.ts']
issues = []
for rel in paths:
    text = Path(rel).read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    lines = text.splitlines()
    trailing = [idx + 1 for idx, line in enumerate(lines) if line.rstrip() != line]
    tabs = [idx + 1 for idx, line in enumerate(lines) if '\t' in line]
    if trailing:
        issues.append(f'{rel}:trailing_whitespace={trailing}')
    if tabs:
        issues.append(f'{rel}:tabs={tabs}')
    if text and not text.endswith('\n'):
        issues.append(f'{rel}:missing_terminal_newline')
if issues:
    sys.stderr.write('lint_smoke_failed=' + ';'.join(issues) + '\n')
    raise SystemExit(1)
typescript_import_smoke:
from pathlib import Path
import subprocess
import sys
targets = ['src/contracts/mission_types.ts']
import_smoke_path = Path('src/contracts/import_smoke.ts')
import_smoke_path.write_text("import * as contract_1 from './mission_types';\nvoid [contract_1];\n", encoding='utf-8')
command = [
    'tsc',
    '--noEmit',
    '--target', 'es2022',
    '--module', 'esnext',
    '--moduleResolution', 'bundler',
    '--skipLibCheck',
    *targets,
    import_smoke_path.as_posix(),
]
raise SystemExit(subprocess.run(command, check=False).returncode)

work_packets.builder_prompt: Create src/contracts/mission_types.ts with minimal TypeScript interfaces needed for a fresh ACPX mission. Include essential type definitions such as Mission, MissionConfig, and any required metadata structures. Keep it strictly minimal—type declarations only, no implementation or business logic.

work_packets.title: Scaffold artifact_types.ts contract file
acceptance_criteria: Contains minimal TypeScript interfaces for artifact contracts
Supports artifact round creation during fresh execution
No runtime logic, test harnesses, or replay engines included

work_packets.builder_prompt: Create src/contracts/artifact_types.ts with minimal TypeScript interfaces needed for ACPX mission artifacts. Include essential type definitions such as Artifact, ArtifactMetadata, and any required round artifact structures. Keep it strictly minimal—type declarations only, no implementation or business logic.
